text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
One day, I head into town with Copano Rickey to
do some shopping, however...

text_block_list.name: Copano Rickey
text_block_list.text: Wha?! Bird poop landed on my shoe?!

text_block_list.name: Copano Rickey
text_block_list.text:
Haha, not at all! If I wipe it clean, there'll be no
more problems!

text_block_list.name: Copano Rickey
text_block_list.text:
If anything, now I'm extra motivated to give my
shoes some care. That's lucky! ☆

text_block_list.name: Copano Rickey
text_block_list.text:
It all comes down to your mindset! Feng shui is all
about positive thinking and always showing
gratitu—

text_block_list.name: Flower Shop Staff
text_block_list.text: AAAH! I'm so sorry! I didn't see you coming as I was throwing the water!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Copano Rickey gets completely soaked. We
manage to dry her clothes afterwards, but still...

text_block_list.name: Copano Rickey
text_block_list.text:
Hmm... well, what I said before still stands. It's all
about keeping a positive mindset!

text_block_list.name: Copano Rickey
text_block_list.text:
At least my shoes got a free wash! I need to stay
thankful and happy! Positivity attracts fortune
after all! ♪

text_block_list.name: Store Clerk
text_block_list.text:
We have a special deal today! All customers who
order a limited-time honeyade will also receive a
coupon for one free regular-size honeyade!

text_block_list.name: Copano Rickey
text_block_list.text:
Wow, they're offering a promotional deal! That's
super lucky, right?

text_block_list.name: Copano Rickey
text_block_list.text: Being positive is the best way to raise your luck after all! Excuse meee, one limited-time honeyade, pleeease!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
It looks like her feng shui-fueled optimism
brought her a little luck. We both smile as we
drink our honeyade together.
